sources.title: HEC Curriculum of Nursing Education - BSN and MSN 2024
sources.scope: Official Generic BSN Semester III structure, credits, course titles and stated course learning outcomes.

sources.title: Nursing Fundamentals, 2nd edition
sources.license: CC-BY-4.0 (some embedded items have separate notices)
sources.scope: Therapeutic communication, nurse-client relationships, clinical communication, documentation and foundational patient safety. Local procedures require institutional review.

sources.title: Nursing Pharmacology, 2nd edition
sources.scope: Foundational pharmacokinetics, pharmacodynamics, drug classes, medication safety and nursing considerations. Doses and local legislation must not be generated without explicit authoritative support.

sources.title: Health Alterations
sources.license: Open RN OER; verify item-level notices
sources.scope: Foundational adult health alterations, disease processes, clinical judgment and person-centred nursing care. Local protocols require institutional review.

sources.title: Nursing Skills, 2nd edition
sources.scope: Health history, physical assessment, documentation and entry-level nursing skills. Local checklists and procedures require institutional review.

sources.title: Anatomy and Physiology 2e
sources.scope: Normal body structure, physiology and homeostatic mechanisms used only as foundation for pathophysiology.
